name: Transfer Pricing Penalty Protection

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must have documentation in existence at the time of filing that establishes the use of a reasonable pricing method and provide it to the IRS within 30 days of a request.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoids substantial valuation misstatement penalties (20-40%) on Section 482 adjustments by maintaining contemporaneous documentation of pricing methods.
